Home › Blog › AI for Small Business

AI for Small Business: Getting Started in 2026

By Lao Lu · Also on lusdaily.com

The $100/Month AI Stack

NeedToolCost
General AI AssistantChatGPT Plus or Claude Pro$20/mo
Customer Support BotChatbase$29-49/mo
Marketing DesignCanva Pro (AI)$13/mo
Workflow AutomationZapier$20-30/mo

Three AI Tools Every Business Needs

1. AI Chatbot for Your Website

Single highest-ROI AI investment. Answers questions 24/7, captures leads, handles routine inquiries. Set up Chatbase in 15 minutes: upload FAQ document, embed widget, done.

🔥 Sponsored Recommendations We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you
Vultr

High-performance cloud servers. Get $300 free credit for new users.
Evoxt

Affordable VPS hosting starting at $2.99/mo. Global data centers.
Mesimgo

Reliable web hosting & cloud services at competitive prices.
xesim

International eSIM data plans. Use code laolu for exclusive discount.
DNSHE

Get a free domain + global DNS acceleration. Quick setup for your projects.

2. AI Writing Tool

ChatGPT Plus handles 90% of small business writing: emails, social posts, product descriptions, customer responses. Claude Pro is better for long-form blog posts and reports.

3. AI Design Tool

Canva AI features generate social graphics, flyers, presentations, and logo variations from text. Replaces the need for a part-time designer for most small businesses.

When to Add More

Add tools as you find pain points: too much time on bookkeeping? Add AI accounting. Drowning in email? Add AI email assistant. Start small and expand based on measured ROI.

FAQ

Start with $50-150/month. Add tools as you see ROI.

Customer support chatbots - 40-60% reduction in support time.

No. Most tools designed for non-technical users.
